display.description: 本月实例个数/同比上月增加个数

search.query: source:instance_bill and productcode:ECS| select a[1] as this, a[2] as last_month, a[1]-a[2] from(select compare(a, 2592000) as a from(select count(distinct instanceid) as a from log ))
search.tokenQuery: source:instance_bill and productcode:ECS| select a[1] as this, a[2] as last_month, a[1]-a[2] from(select compare(a, 604800) as a from(select count(distinct instanceid) as a from log ))

search.tokenQuery: source:instance_bill and productcode:SLB| select a[1] as this, a[2] as last_month, a[1]-a[2] from(select compare(a, 604800) as a from(select count(distinct instanceid) as a from log ))

search.query: source:instance_bill  | select tag , round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" from(select  regexp_extract_all(tag, 'key:(\S+)\s+value:([^\s;]+)') as arr , PretaxAmount  from log ) ,unnest(arr) as t(tag) group by  tag limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: source:instance_bill  | select k,v , round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" from(select split_to_map(tag,';',' ') as m , PretaxAmount  from log ) ,unnest(m) as t(k,v) group by  k,v limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source: instance_bill  | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as t, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "金额" ,tag from( select __time__, regexp_extract_all(tag, 'key:(\S+)\s+value:([^\s;]+)') as arr, PretaxAmount from log),unnest(arr) as t(tag) group by t,tag order by t limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill  | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as t, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "金额" ,tag from( select __time__, regexp_extract_all(tag, 'key:(\S+)\s+value:([^\s;]+)') as arr, PretaxAmount from log),unnest(arr) as t(tag) group by t,tag order by t limit 1000

search.query: source:bill |select  round(d[1],3),round(d[2],3) ,round(d[3]*100-100,3)  from(select compare(total,2592000) as d from(select sum(PretaxAmount) as total from log ))
search.tokenQuery: source:bill |select  round(d[1],3),round(d[2],3) ,round(d[3]*100-100,3)  from(select compare(total,604800) as d from(select sum(PretaxAmount) as total from log ))

search.query: source: instance_bill and ecs |select NickName, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)   as "金额" group by NickName order by  "金额" desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ecs |select NickName, round(sum(PretaxGrossAmount),3)   as "金额" group by NickName order by  "金额" desc limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source: instance_bill and ecs | select Region, sum(PretaxAmount) as amount group by region order by amount desc limit 100
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ecs | select Region, sum(PretaxAmount) as amount group by region order by amount desc limit 100

search.query: source: instance_bill and ecs | select Region, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "金额" group by region order by "金额" desc limit 100
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ecs | select Region, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "金额" group by region order by "金额" desc limit 100

search.query: source:instance_bill | select case when rank_by_product = 1 then ProductName else '' end as "产品",case when rank_by_product = 1 then cast(round(pretaxAmountProduct,3) as varchar) else '' end as "产品总金额" ,  case when rank_by_product_item =1 then item else '' end as "计费项", ListPrice as "单价", round(usage,3) as "使用量",round(coalesce(DeductedByResourcePackage,0)) as "资源包抵扣用量",round(PretaxGrossAmount ,3)as "原始金额",round(InvoiceDiscount,3) as "优惠金额", round(DeductedByCoupons,3) as "优惠券优惠金额",round(DeductedByCashCoupons,3) as "代金券抵扣",round(DeductedByPrepaidCard,3) as "储值卡抵扣" ,round(PaymentAmount,3) as "现金支付",round(OutstandingAmount,3) as "未接清金额",round(PretaxAmount,3) as "应付金额" from(select *, rank() over(partition by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc) as rank_by_product,rank() over(partition by productname,item order by pretaxAmount desc ) as rank_by_product_item  from( select *, sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname) as pretaxAmountProduct,sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname,item) as pretaxAmountItem from (select ProductName, concat(BillingItem , '(',UsageUnit,')') as item, ListPrice, sum(Usage) as usage,sum(DeductedByResourcePackage) as DeductedByResourcePackage, sum(DeductedByCashCoupons) as DeductedByCashCoupons , sum(DeductedByCoupons) as DeductedByCoupons, sum(DeductedByPrepaidCard) as DeductedByPrepaidCard, sum(InvoiceDiscount) as InvoiceDiscount, sum(OutstandingAmount) as OutstandingAmount, sum(PaymentAmount) as PaymentAmount, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount  from log group by productname, item, listprice))) order by PretaxAmountProduct desc,PretaxAmountitem desc, pretaxamount  desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: source:instance_bill | select case when rank_by_product = 1 then ProductName else '' end as "产品",case when rank_by_product = 1 then cast(round(pretaxAmountProduct,3) as varchar) else '' end as "产品总金额" ,  case when rank_by_product_item =1 then item else '' end as "计费项", ListPrice as "单价", round(usage,3) as "使用量",round(coalesce(DeductedByResourcePackage,0)) as "资源包抵扣用量",round(PretaxGrossAmount ,3)as "原始金额",round(InvoiceDiscount,3) as "优惠金额", round(DeductedByCoupons,3) as "优惠券优惠金额",round(DeductedByCashCoupons,3) as "代金券抵扣",round(DeductedByPrepaidCard,3) as "储值卡抵扣" ,round(PaymentAmount,3) as "现金支付",round(OutstandingAmount,3) as "未接清金额",round(PretaxAmount,3) as "应付金额" from(select *, rank() over(partition by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc) as rank_by_product,rank() over(partition by productname,item order by pretaxAmount desc ) as rank_by_product_item  from( select *, sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname) as pretaxAmountProduct,sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname,item) as pretaxAmountItem from (select ProductName, concat(BillingItem , '(',UsageUnit,')') as item, ListPrice, sum(Usage) as usage,sum(DeductedByResourcePackage) as DeductedByResourcePackage, sum(DeductedByCashCoupons) as DeductedByCashCoupons , sum(DeductedByCoupons) as DeductedByCoupons, sum(DeductedByPrepaidCard) as DeductedByPrepaidCard, sum(InvoiceDiscount) as InvoiceDiscount, sum(OutstandingAmount) as OutstandingAmount, sum(PaymentAmount) as PaymentAmount, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount  from log group by productname, item, listprice))) order by PretaxAmountProduct desc,PretaxAmountitem desc, pretaxamount  desc limit 1000

search.query: source:instance_bill | select concat('"',tag,'"') as tag from(select distinct(tag)   from(select  regexp_extract_all(tag, 'key:(\S+)\s+value:([^\s;]+)') as arr   from log ) ,unnest(arr) as t(tag))  order by tag
